title.en: Outside the human domain, at Fortress No. 1.

content.en:
Outside the human domain, at Fortress No. 1.

Ye Tian's duplicate body sat here, and he knew that this time, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance would lose a lot.

Even if he is strong and has multiple replica bodies, he can kill all those Demon Venerables, but there are too many Supreme Dao Void Demons, and it is impossible for him to kill them all in an instant, so there will inevitably be many fortresses that will be breached, and a large number of Supreme Dao Realms will be slaughtered.

He couldn't change the situation, he could only keep the human domain, and then kill the Dao Void Demon side as soon as possible.

Soon.

The Supreme Dao Void Demon side invaded on a large scale, led by the First Demon Venerable, supplemented by many Demon Venerables.

"The Supreme Dao Void Demon has really invaded in an all-round way!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before, it was just speculation, and I didn't dare to be 100% sure, but now it's 100% certain.

All of a sudden, the formations of the fortresses opened.

Ye Tian and the others did not intercept the Dao Void Demon in the Void Domain, in that case, if there was no support, it would be easy to be trapped.

After all, in terms of overall strength, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance was much worse than the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

It is impossible for Ye Tian to kill the entire Supreme Dao Void Demon with his own strength, maybe there is an Innate Primordial Treasure that can trap him for a short time!

As time passed, the Void Demon side of the Dao Void Demon was getting closer and closer to the side of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

Finally.

They're coming!

For the countless Supreme Dao Realms of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, this is definitely the biggest crisis in history, even the Legendary Supreme Dao Realm may just be cannon fodder, and the key to the victory or defeat of the war is those elders and Demon Venerables.

At this time.

A group of Supreme Dao Void Demons came to the Human Domain, and the leader was the Second Demon Venerable Demon Immortal.

The Void Demon side knew that Ye Tian had become the thirty-fifth elder, and Ye Tian also had many clones, so the threat in the future was too great.

So.

The Second Demon Venerable decided to break through the human domain first, he felt that Ye Tian's body would definitely stay in the human domain, and if he killed Ye Tian's body, those clones would definitely dissipate, which was equivalent to killing many top elders at once.

But he was wrong, every copy of Ye Tian's body was an ontology.

Moreover, Ye Tian's strength was far beyond his imagination.

......

"The Second Demon Venerable Demon Immortal, the Supreme Dao Void Demon side really values me more!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Swish!

Ye Tian walked out of the No. 1 fortress of the Human Domain and directly killed the Demon Nether.

When the demon saw Ye Tian and was about to make a move, he suddenly found that Ye Tian's cultivation was wrong, and he had also reached the Eternal Dao, and the Eternal Dao realm was even higher than him.

The key is that Ye Tian has superimposed eighteen supreme mythical bodies, which means that these eighteen supreme mythical bodies have reached the ninth metamorphosis.

"Not good!"

Demon Styx's face changed drastically.

At this time, Ye Tian made a move.

The rules of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao turned into silk threads running through, and the dense Supreme Dao Void Demon was instantly penetrated and shattered, and even the top demon lord was instantly killed like ants.

The Demon Immortal tried to resist, but Ye Tian held a spear in his hand and cast an Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Power, stabbing with one shot.

In an instant.

The various innate primordial treasures on the Demon Nether's body turned into defensive light, but they were still useless.

Burst!!!!!

These Innate Wish Treasures were directly shattered, and the body of the Demon Nether was also penetrated, and the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were destroying his body.

"You ......"

The Demon Immortal felt incredible, this strength seemed to be even more terrifying than the First Demon Venerable!

Boom!

The body of the demon turned into a corpse and floated in the void.

"Yue'er, Xingchen, these Supreme Dao Void Demons have been handed over to you, and I will go to support other places. "

Ye Tian admonished.

"Good!"

Xiao Yue responded.

She is the patriarch, and here are some demon masters, ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons, and weaker Supreme Dao Void Demons, with their strength, they can naturally be easily killed.

And.

Ye Tian also has a replica body guarding the human domain, if something really happens, he can come out of the human domain.

......

Sioux Domain.

Su Ho and Su Yuan are fighting against a Demon Venerable, this Demon Venerable's strength is relatively strong, Su Ho and Su Yuan can't suppress it together, and there are many Demon Lords who have invaded Su Domain.

If this continues, Su Yu may not be able to stop it.

But the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance has a lot of strength gaps compared to the Supreme Dao Void Demon, who can support Su Domain at this time?

Suddenly.

A familiar figure appeared.

"It's Elder Ye Tian!"

The two patriarchs, Su Ho and Su Yuan, were overjoyed, how strong Ye Tian's strength was, and the first patriarch also said that Ye Tian's strength was comparable to him, even if it was not true, it would definitely be no problem to kill this Demon Venerable.

Ye Tian arrived and shot directly.

Airplanes!

With just one shot, the Demon Venerable was directly pierced and shattered into his body, and he fell to death in an instant, like an ant.

This scene shocked Su Ho and Su Yuan.

What kind of strength is this, kill a powerful Demon Venerable in seconds!

"Elder Suho, Elder Su Yuan, this is solved, you first slaughter the Supreme Dao Void Demon here, and then go to support other places!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

Elder Soho and Elder Su Yuan replied.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian supported everywhere, and a Demon Venerable was killed by him.

......

A ruin of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance here.

Just now, the First Demon Venerable broke through here and destroyed this Innate Origin Domain.

And the first elder can only deal with it and involve the first demon venerable.

He was waiting for Ye Tian to arrive.

The number of Demon Venerables was more than one-third more than that of the Patriarch, so Ye Tian needed to kill a group of Demon Venerables before coming here to besiege the First Elder with him.

Otherwise, Ye Tian would directly come to besiege the First Demon Venerable, and the other elders would not be opponents at all, and they would suffer heavy losses.

This is also a pre-negotiated countermeasure.

As time passed, the number of Demon Venerables continued to decrease, and the First Demon Venerable was also a little panicked.

He found that he couldn't contact the Second Demon Venerable.

"What's the matter with the Demon Styx, why don't you reply to me?"

The First Demon Venerable Demon Gu frowned.

Moreover, many Demon Venerables can't be contacted, and there is a high probability that they have fallen.

It's only been a long time since the invasion to lose so many Demon Venerables, which is too abnormal.

Unless the Innate Origin Domain Alliance hid a powerful and terrifying elder, perhaps even no less than the first elder, it would not let the Demon Venerables suffer such a heavy loss.

At this time, the retreat was undoubtedly too much of a loss, and he could only make a desperate bet, and he had to kill the first patriarch first.

Thundered!!!

The First Demon Venerable frantically attacked the First Elder, and each attack made the First Elder crack all over, but he relied on the special Innate Primordial Treasure to save his life and recover again and again.

But after a long time, the first patriarch couldn't bear it.

However, he still didn't use his hole cards, because Ye Tian was coming!
